Unnamed Package

  • Class
    Description
    AppState
    Shared mutable application state used across views.
    AuthDao
    Handles authentication against the teammembers table.
    CartLine
    Represents one line item in the active cart.
    CashierView
    Cashier workspace for cart building and order checkout.
    CustomizationDialog
    Modal dialog used to collect menu customization choices.
    Db
    Database connection helper that loads credentials from db.properties.
    dbSetup
    Environment-backed database configuration constants.
    EmployeeDao
    DAO for employee management actions.
    EmployeeDao.Employee
    Immutable employee row projection.
    InventoryDao
    DAO for inventory data and inventory-based reports.
    InventoryDao.UsageRow
    Projection row for usage chart results.
    InventoryItem
    Immutable inventory item model.
    JdbcBootstrap
    Command-line bootstrap utility for validating JDBC connectivity and schema.
    JdbcSmokeTest
    Minimal database smoke test utility.
    LoginView
    Login screen for cashier/manager authentication.
    LoginView.LoginCallback
    Callback invoked when login succeeds.
    LowStockDetailView
    Popup view displaying details for a low-stock inventory item.
    MainApp
    JavaFX application entrypoint for the POS system.
    ManagerView
    Manager workspace for operations, reports, and employee/menu administration.
    ManagerView.LowStockOpen
    Callback for opening the low-stock detail popup.
    MenuDao
    DAO for menu item CRUD and recipe creation.
    MenuDao.Ingredient
    Ingredient row used when creating a new menu recipe.
    MenuItem
    Immutable menu item model.
    OrdersDao
    Data access methods for creating orders and generating order-based reports.
    OrdersDao.OrderRow
     
    PaymentDialog
    Modal dialog for selecting payment method at checkout.
    PaymentDialog.Method
     
    Role
    Supported application roles.
    UserSession
    Authenticated user session model.
    ZReportDao
    Data-access object for the daily_totals and z_report_log tables.
    ZReportDao.DailyTotals
